toolPurpose: Retrieve all tasks in a specific Asana project with optional filtering and field selection.

project_gid.description: Global ID of the Asana project to retrieve tasks from

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated fields to return (e.g., 'gid,name,assignee,due_on,completed'). Improves query efficiency.

completed_on.description: Filter by completion status: 'any' (default), 'true' (completed only), or 'false' (active only)

is_blocking.description: Filter by whether tasks are blocking other tasks

is_blocked.description: Filter by whether tasks are blocked by other tasks

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed information about a specific task in Asana.

task_gid.description: Global ID of the task to retrieve

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated fields to return (e.g., 'gid,name,assignee,due_on,completed,notes,projects'). Optimizes response size.

toolPurpose: Create a new task in Asana with name, project assignment, due date, assignee, and notes.

projects.description: Array of project GIDs to add the task to

assignee.description: User GID to assign the task to

notes.description: Task description/notes in plain text or markdown

workspace.description: Workspace GID (required if task is not assigned to a project)

external_id.description: External ID for tracking integration references

toolPurpose: Update an existing Asana task's fields including name, due date, assignee, notes, or completion status.

task_gid.description: Global ID of the task to update

due_on.description: Updated due date in YYYY-MM-DD format

completed.description: Mark task as completed (true) or uncompleted (false)

toolPurpose: Retrieve all projects in an Asana workspace with optional filtering.

workspace_gid.description: Global ID of the Asana workspace

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated fields to return (e.g., 'gid,name,owner,created_at,archived'). Improves query efficiency.

archived.description: Filter by archived status (true=archived only, false=active only, omit for all)

toolPurpose: Search for tasks in an Asana workspace by text query, assignee, or other criteria.

workspace_gid.description: Global ID of the Asana workspace to search in

text.description: Free-form text search query (searches task name and notes)

assignee_gid.description: Filter results to tasks assigned to a specific user GID

project_gid.description: Filter results to tasks in a specific project GID

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated fields to return. Optimizes response payload.
